description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun with a utilitarian, industrial design, featuring a predominantly metallic construction. It has a slender, cylindrical barrel and a prominent wireframe folding stock extending from the rear, designed for portability and ease of storage. The receiver is rectangular with visible rivets and mechanical details, and a box magazine protrudes vertically from the underside in front of the trigger guard. The grip is angled and textured for secure handling, and the trigger is housed within a robust trigger guard. The top of the receiver includes simple iron sights, and the overall finish is matte with a dark, gunmetal coloration.
description: A compact, metallic submachine gun with a wireframe folding stock, box magazine, and simple iron sights. The finish is matte and dark, with a utilitarian, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the gun, wireframe folding stock, box magazine, and grip details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the magazine and grip beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and receiver details, with the magazine and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wireframe stock's attachment and the slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
